name: Dropcontact
description: Find B2B emails and enrich contacts

endpoints.label: Enrich Contact

fields.label: Simplify Output (Faster)
fields.description: When off, waits for the contact data before completing. Waiting time can be adjusted with Extend Wait Time option. When on, returns a request_id that can be used later in the Fetch Request operation.

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: num_siren, siret, company, country, first_name, full_name, last_name, linkedin, phone, website)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: waitTime, siren, language)

endpoints.description: Find B2B emails and enrich your contact from his name and his website
